flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bristol Community College fell 34% between 2006 and 2009 (21.7% → 14.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Bristol Community College rose 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.3k → $8.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bristol Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.2k → $5.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bristol Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).
